title: Immersive Portal Gun (Forge) ReTexture
description: A resource pack that changes the IP gun's texture to various ones from other Portal games!
body:
A (not) simple resource pack, that changes the [Immersive Portal Gun's ](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-portal-gun-for-forge) texture for the ones in other Portal games! 

TODO LIST:
- red portal gun portals color change
- better model for the Portal Stories: Mel portal gun
